title: shutdown envelope
description: JSON envelope emitted to stdout when a shutdown signal interrupts execution (GAP-002, v1.0.82).

code.description: Deterministic SHUTDOWN_EXIT_CODE, distinct from 128+N Unix convention.

message.description: Human-readable description including the triggering signal name.

signal.description: The Unix signal that triggered the shutdown.

graceful.description: True distinguishes operator-requested shutdown from crash (which uses stderr-only).
